title: Automated SQL Query Translation
scenario: Translate the given SQL query into an equivalent query in another language. The input query should be in plain English, and the output query should be in SQL syntax. Ensure the translated query has the same functionality as the original input query. The input query will be provided in a brief paragraph.
constraints: Must cover the basic query operations (SELECT, FROM, WHERE, GROUP BY)
Must be able to handle basic data types (integers, strings, dates)

evaluationCriteria.description: Check if the translated query has the same functionality as the original input query
Verify that the translated query is syntactically correct
Evaluate if the translated query includes any performance optimization techniques (e.g., indexing, caching)
Assess the readability of the translated query
